Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for a .NET project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to:

1. First explore the project structure to understand what we're working with
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the codebase structure.

data.content: Now I have a full picture of the codebase. Let me run the tests with code coverage collection.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run tests with code coverage via coverlet

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run tests with code coverage via coverlet

data.reasoningText: Now I have a good picture of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage using coverlet (which is already referenced in the test project). I'll use `dotnet test` with coverage collection enabled and generate a Cobertura report, then parse it to analyze coverage and risk hotspots.

arguments.description: Run tests with code coverage via coverlet

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-b8d79af651b54ffca4a18e9cdbb9e1be && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./TestResults --no-pager 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage via coverlet", "initial_wait": 60}
